message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "BeanShellExtension" as BeanShellExtension #LightBlue2
participant "BeanShellExtensionUI" as BeanShellExtensionUI #LightGreen2
participant "BeanShellMenu" as BeanShellMenu #Lavender
participant "BeanShellMacroAction" as BeanShellMacroAction #Pink
participant "BeanShellMacrosUI" as BeanShellMacrosUI #OrangeRed10
participant "BeanShellMacroController" as BeanShellMacroController #Yellow70
database BSInterpreter

User ->> BeanShellExtension : openBSext()
activate BeanShellExtension 
    BeanShellExtension->>BeanShellExtensionUI:create(this, uicontroller)    
        activate BeanShellExtensionUI        
            BeanShellExtensionUI->>BeanShellMenu:openBSmenu(uicontroller)            
                activate BeanShellMenu                
                    BeanShellMenu->>BeanShellMacroAction:open(uicontroller)                    
                        activate BeanShellMacroAction                        
                            BeanShellMacroAction->>BeanShellMacrosUI:create()                            
                                activate BeanShellMacrosUI                                
                                    BeanShellMacrosUI->>BeanShellMacroController:create()                                    
                                        activate BeanShellMacroController                                        
                                            BeanShellMacroController-->BSInterpreter:create()                                            
                                                activate BSInterpreter                                                
                                                    deactivate BSInterpreter                                                                                                  
                                                        end note                                                                                                                                              
                                                            else if (exp.toString().trim().length()== 0 || exp.equals("null")) then                                                            
                                                                alt macro name exists or not                                                                   
                                                                        loop while macros exist                                                                               
                                                                            for each of the lines                                                                                               
                                                                                    opt line starts with //                                                                                       
                                                                                            ignore this comment line                                                                                   
                                                                                        else execute expression                                                                                      
                                                                                            getInterpreter().executeMacro(exp.toString());                                                                                     
                                                                                        end                                                                                          
                                                                                    end                              
@enduml
